keyEvents.text: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Korea Republic 0, Czechia 1. Ladislav Krejcí (Czechia) header from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Vladimír Coufal.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Hwang Hee-Chan replaces Lee Jae-Sung.
Substitution, Czechia. Adam Hlozek replaces Pavel Sulc.
Substitution, Czechia. Tomás Chory replaces Patrik Schick.
Substitution, Czechia. Michal Sadílek replaces Lukás Provod.
Goal! Korea Republic 1, Czechia 1. Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lee Kang-In.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Eom Ji-Sung replaces Lee Tae-Seok.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Oh Hyeon-Gyu replaces Son Heung-Min.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Korea Republic 2, Czechia 1. Oh Hyeon-Gyu (Korea Republic) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Hwang In-Beom.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Kim Jin-Gyu replaces Hwang In-Beom.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Park Jin-Seob replaces Paik Seung-Ho.
Substitution, Czechia. Mojmír Chytil replaces Alexandr Sojka.
Lee Gi-Hyuk (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
